Notice Of Motion And Motion If Defendants Austin Williamsons And Hunter Thomspon To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From Comlaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declartion Of Edgar Hawkyard; [Proposed] Order Motion To Strike Exemplary Damages
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AUSTIN WILLIAMSON, HUNTER THOMPSON's Motion to Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From Comlaint.

The motion to strike is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; no opposition was filed.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
